# Owkin MCP Server

Access Owkin's AI-powered biomarker discovery and precision medicine platform for oncology and drug development.

## Access

Requires an **Owkin account** with platform access. Contact Owkin for access credentials.

## Setup

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "owkin": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://mcp.k.owkin.com/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

## Capabilities

- AI-powered biomarker identification from pathology data
- Patient stratification and treatment response prediction
- Access to federated learning models across hospital networks

## Source

Maintained by [Owkin](https://www.owkin.com/).
